title: Nexus SoulNarrativeRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/memory/soul/reflect. The endpoint reads or regenerates the cached whole-Creator SOUL narrative; per-world narratives are out of scope for V1.81.

creator_id.description: Active creator identifier; the endpoint rejects mismatches through the existing Local API auth/creator checks.

force_regenerate.description: When true, synthesize and overwrite the cached narrative even if a current or stale cache row exists. When omitted or false, the endpoint is read/status-only and does not invoke the LLM.
